story.text:
# 💡 C71 · The Horizon Vertex V35
**concept** · shared · knowledge

V35 (Protection ∧ Computation ∧ Value) is the lattice address where quantum durability is decided. Geometric resonance; low confidence pending operational evidence. Active (40%).
